column8: The shop assistant finally agreed_________a full refund.
column9: Bill asked me why___________to go shopping with me.
column10: Ellie asked Stan__________to look at the new catalogue.
column11: Stephen___________me he'd bought that suit in a sale.
column12: "What did the man say when you challenged him?"" He said he _____________pay for the things in his bag, but I didn't believe him!"
column13: When I last saw Carrie, she told me she_________________of buying a house, but now she's changed her mind.
column14: "What did they say when they realised you weren't a shoplifter?""They apologised___________me."
